name: Corn Bread for Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F and grease an 8-inch square baking pan.
2. In a bowl whisk together cornmeal, flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. In a small bowl whisk together milk, egg, and melted butter and add to the cornmeal mixture, stirring only until just combined.
4. Pour batter into pan and bake in the middle of the oven for 20 to 25 minutes, or until pale golden and a tester comes out clean.
5. Cool cornbread in the pan on a rack for 5 minutes. Invert cornbread onto the rack and cool completely.
6. Crumble cornbread coarsely into a large shallow baking pan.
7. Let cornbread stand at room temperature until stale, at least 3 hours or overnight.
8. Preheat oven to 300°F.
9. Toast cornbread in the middle of the oven, stirring occasionally, until dried and golden, about 30 minutes.
